title: ferrotorch-core: matmul_differentiable GPU dispatch limited to 2D x 2D — surfaced by phase 2.4 (#766)
description: matmul_differentiable in grad_fns/linalg.rs only routes a.ndim() == 2 && b.ndim() == 2 to GPU. All other rank combinations (1D x 1D dot, 2D x 1D mv, 1D x 2D vm, 3D x 3D batched, 4D x 2D broadcast) fall through to dot_differentiable / mv_differentiable / bmm_differentiable / linalg::matmul which use .data()? on the inputs. Calling matmul_differentiable on CUDA tensors of these shapes returns Err(GpuTensorNotAccessible). Fix: route 3D-x-3D batched to backend.bmm_f32/_f64 and 1D-vector cases to a fused gemv path (or readback at the dispatch boundary with a tracing::warn!). Skipped in conformance_linalg.rs gpu_matmul under cascade_skip() with this issue ref.
